user.title: Add Thread Panel
user.description: Paste the panel's manifest YAML below. Reference templates for each product live in the repository under panels/<id>/ha/manifest.yaml — copy one, adjust the entity_ids to match your Home Assistant install, and paste the result here.

error.invalid_manifest: Manifest could not be parsed. See the Home Assistant log for details.

abort.already_configured: A panel with this panel_id is already configured.
